description: Configure the shared field tablet's Chrome browser for outdoor touch-screen use according to the specification at ~/Desktop/solar_terminal_config.txt. The configuration requires organizing operational bookmarks into four folders, deleting personal bookmarks left by the previous technician, setting the font size to 22 for high-glare visibility, and enabling the 'Overlay Scrollbars' and 'Smooth Scrolling' flags. Additionally, create a 'fault' search engine shortcut, set the homepage to CAISO, update the download directory to ~/Documents/SCADA_Exports with a download prompt enabled, and disable credential caching.
instruction: A configuration specification is located at ~/Desktop/solar_terminal_config.txt. Read it carefully. You must organize the unorganized bookmarks into 4 top-level folders: 'SCADA & Telemetry', 'Weather & Irradiance', 'Grid Market Data', and 'Equipment Docs'. Completely delete all personal/entertainment bookmarks. Modify Chrome's appearance settings for a size 22 font. Go to chrome://flags and enable 'Overlay Scrollbars' and 'Smooth Scrolling'. Add a custom search engine with keyword 'fault' pointing to 'https://www.inverter-faults-db.com/search?code=%s'. Set the homepage to the CAISO Outlook page, configure the download directory to ~/Documents/SCADA_Exports (and enable 'ask where to save'), and disable password saving and address autofill for shared-device security.
